ExtensionReleaseArtifactType.description: Type of definition this artifact row holds. extension = extension root (dependsOn, defaultLocale, supportedLocales, translations); others = one row per definition with that type.

ExtensionReleaseArtifactDefinition.description: One row per piece of an extension release. Stored in a separate resource/table from ExtensionReleaseDefinition. Full release snapshot can be assembled on demand.

extensionReleaseId.description: Extension release this artifact belongs to.

definitionId.description: Id of the definition: extensionId for artifactType extension; entity id, page id, etc. for other types.

snapshot.description: The definition JSON. Validates against the corresponding extension meta model (ExtensionDefinition root shape, EntityDefinition, PageDefinition, etc.).
